---
status: public
shortDescription: "The name self is not an expression"
shortCorrection: "Even the name self on its own is an expression"
concepts:
  - Expression
  - Self
related:
- id: NoAtomicExpression
  relation: General case
inOtherPl:
# - pl: JavaScript
#   id: ThisNoExpression
- pl: Java
  id: ThisNoExpression
spec:
   - id: plr3.8
     sections: ["3.2"]
   - id: plr3.8
     sections: ["6.0"]
plVersion:
  # from: ecma6
  # to: ecma11
expressibleInNms:
- id: ExpressionAsTree
  how: atomic expression self
references:
---

In a method body, ```self``` is not an expression. It can only be used for the specific purpose of instance variable accesses and method calls/accesses.

frontmatter.shortDescription: The name self is not an expression
frontmatter.shortCorrection: Even the name self on its own is an expression
